embeds.title: More Bugs Open
embeds.description: We have increased the limits for the amount of bugs able to be open. Free users have have `2 bugs` open at a time. Premium users can have `5 bugs` open at a time.

embeds.title: End of bug title
embeds.description: We have increased the number of letters and numbers at the end of a bug. This allow more bogs to be open at a time. (Global)

embeds.title: Updated our Privacy Policy
embeds.description: We have updated section 2, and added a new section in our Privacy Policy. View it here: https://bugs.ziggymc.me/privacy

embeds.title: Reopen Bug
embeds.description: When the automated system/staff member deletes a bug thread, it will still send the reopen button even if the thread is gone.
